title: How to get Verilator to enable pragmas in SV code
body:
I have some SystemVeilog RTL that I am trying to Verilate.  In the SystemVerilog/Verilog RTL are pragmas enabling I/O insertion such as (backtick used below because this app removes the char):
...
import a_pkg::a_s;
...
backtick ifdef DEBUG
          output a_s   a_o,
backtick endif
...

I have tried to get this DEBUG pragma to be recognized so that the Verilated output contains the I/O but I can't seem to do it.  I tried to verilate it with an added file that contains:

   `define DEBUG

I also tried to just add +define+DEBUG to the verilator command, but it doesn't seem to end up in the generated .cpp code.
